{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Horizon's conjured hands
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can conjure hands that appear thin, worn, skeletal, and have gaunt fingers and pointed nails.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
